# ---- environment-normalization recipe (applied by every rig) ----
env-unset LEAN_PATH
env-unset LEAN_SYSROOT
env-set LC_ALL=C
env-set TZ=UTC

# ---- reproduction commands ----
repro-manifest scripts/tribunal/gen_epoch_manifest.sh --check
repro-differential scripts/tribunal/ref_vs_ref.sh
